Prompt
U
Oracle Events
Discover the Account History: The agent should search emails using search_emails (query: "Terraform" or "Vantage Distributed" or "Rachel Nguyen") and Slack using conversations_search_messages (search_query: "Terraform" or "Vantage Distributed") for the Terraform Digital / Vantage Distributed account history. Note: the CRM company record is stored under the name "Vantage Distributed" while the contact uses "Terraform Digital." Key discoveries include: Julian's original onboarding emails with Rachel Nguyen, the self-serve portal setup, and the $1.85M enterprise deal (deal-terraform-digital-001, dealstage: closedwon).
Investigate the AWS Cost Spike: The agent should find the email thread using search_emails (query: "AWS" or "cost spike" or similar) about the March AWS cost surge ($42,870 vs $14,300 baseline) caused by Terraform's onboarding traffic, Samira's root cause analysis, and Elena's directives for cost alerts and pricing model review.
Uncover the AM Assignment Crisis: The agent should search Slack using conversations_search_messages (search_query: "Terraform" or "AM assignment" or similar, filter_in_channel: #customer-engagement) and emails using search_emails (query: "Terraform relocations" or similar) to discover that when Rachel requested the first 3 relocations (Priya Dasgupta, Marcus Liu, Samantha Obi), all three AMs declined—Mina was buried in Vectral, Catalina in NorthWind, Emeka in Mosaic. David escalated the capacity crisis to Elena in #executive.
Investigate the Reply-All Pricing Leak: The agent must find the Slack messages using conversations_search_messages (search_query: "reply-all" or "pricing leak" or similar) and emails using search_emails (query: "pricing" or "Catalina" or similar) about Catalina accidentally Reply-All'ing internal pricing strategy (margin floors, volume discount tiers) to Rachel Nguyen. Rachel responded demanding the discussed discount and asking who her AM is. David escalated this as a client relationship emergency.
Discover the Resolution: The agent should find Elena's decision using search_emails (query: "Terraform" or "Mina" or similar) or conversations_search_messages (search_query: "Terraform AM" or similar) to discover Mina's assignment as Terraform's AM, Catalina's mandated apology, and the announcement of a dedicated Terraform coordinator hire.
Check Current Relocation Status: The agent should search Airtable using airtable_search_records (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Client Accounts", field_name: "Client", value: "Terraform Digital"), CRM deals using crm_search_deals (dealname: "Terraform" or company_id for Terraform), and emails for the Q2 relocation batch (3 employees: Priya Dasgupta Austin-to-Chicago, Marcus Liu Portland-to-NYC, Samantha Obi Denver-to-SF). The deal (deal-terraform-q2-reloc-batch1) is at "qualification" stage in the CRM.
Investigate Mina's Vectral Workload: The agent should search Slack using conversations_search_messages (search_query: "Mina Vectral" or "Vectral renegotiation" or similar) and CRM using crm_search_deals (dealname: "Vectral") to confirm Mina is stretched thin managing the Vectral Systems contract renegotiation alongside the new Terraform account assignment.
Identify Unresolved Issues: The agent should search Linear using linear_list_issues (query: "invoice" or "Terraform" or "safety" or similar) to discover the ticket "Invoice email template safety checks — prevent attachment mismatches" (linear_issue_6b59cce3afc2) that was deprioritized from the Terraform pricing leak—assigned to Lena Bjorkstrom but deprioritized and sitting in backlog. Also check whether volume pricing has been formalized (it hasn't—Alejandro modeled tiers but no formal agreement exists).
Discover David's Personal Email: The agent should search emails using search_emails (query: "David" or "out sick" or "OOO" or similar) to find David Chen's "Out Sick - April 26" email, which contains his personal email address david_rocks@yahoo.com. This is needed for CC'ing David on the apology email to Rachel, since he is out of office and not reachable at his work email.
Flag CRM Deal as At Risk: The agent must update the Terraform Digital deal stage to "at_risk" using crm_update_deal_stage (id: the discovered deal ID, dealstage: "at_risk"). Since crm_update_deal_stage only accepts id and dealstage, the agent should also log a detailed engagement note summarizing all open issues using crm_create_engagement (engagement_type: "NOTE", body: summary of open issues, company_ids: [Terraform company ID]).
Send Apology Email to Rachel: The agent should send an email using send_email (sender: "julian.brooks@moveops.com", recipients: ["rachel.nguyen@terraformdigital.com"], cc: ["david_rocks@yahoo.com"], subject and content acknowledging the account management failures (reply-all, AM confusion, pricing ambiguity) and confirming Mina as the dedicated AM going forward).
Create Linear Tickets: The agent should create Linear issues using linear_create_issue (team: appropriate team, title and description for each) for any untracked problems—e.g., formalizing Terraform volume pricing, ensuring relocation batch coordination has a tracking ticket, or escalating the deprioritized invoice safety ticket.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

Discover the Account History: The agent should search emails using search_emails (query: "Terraform" or "Vantage Distributed" or "Rachel Nguyen") and Slack using conversations_search_messages (search_query: "Terraform" or "Vantage Distributed") for the Terraform Digital / Vantage Distributed account history. Note: the CRM company record is stored under the name "Vantage Distributed" while the contact uses "Terraform Digital." Key discoveries include: Julian's original onboarding emails with Rachel Nguyen, the self-serve portal setup, and the $1.85M enterprise deal (deal-terraform-digital-001, dealstage: closedwon).
Investigate the AWS Cost Spike: The agent should find the email thread using search_emails (query: "AWS" or "cost spike" or similar) about the March AWS cost surge ($42,870 vs $14,300 baseline) caused by Terraform's onboarding traffic, Samira's root cause analysis, and Elena's directives for cost alerts and pricing model review.
Uncover the AM Assignment Crisis: The agent should search Slack using conversations_search_messages (search_query: "Terraform" or "AM assignment" or similar, filter_in_channel: #customer-engagement) and emails using search_emails (query: "Terraform relocations" or similar) to discover that when Rachel requested the first 3 relocations (Priya Dasgupta, Marcus Liu, Samantha Obi), all three AMs declined—Mina was buried in Vectral, Catalina in NorthWind, Emeka in Mosaic. David escalated the capacity crisis to Elena in #executive.
Investigate the Reply-All Pricing Leak: The agent must find the Slack messages using conversations_search_messages (search_query: "reply-all" or "pricing leak" or similar) and emails using search_emails (query: "pricing" or "Catalina" or similar) about Catalina accidentally Reply-All'ing internal pricing strategy (margin floors, volume discount tiers) to Rachel Nguyen. Rachel responded demanding the discussed discount and asking who her AM is. David escalated this as a client relationship emergency.
Discover the Resolution: The agent should find Elena's decision using search_emails (query: "Terraform" or "Mina" or similar) or conversations_search_messages (search_query: "Terraform AM" or similar) to discover Mina's assignment as Terraform's AM, Catalina's mandated apology, and the announcement of a dedicated Terraform coordinator hire.
Check Current Relocation Status: The agent should search Airtable using airtable_search_records (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Client Accounts", field_name: "Client", value: "Terraform Digital"), CRM deals using crm_search_deals (dealname: "Terraform" or company_id for Terraform), and emails for the Q2 relocation batch (3 employees: Priya Dasgupta Austin-to-Chicago, Marcus Liu Portland-to-NYC, Samantha Obi Denver-to-SF). The deal (deal-terraform-q2-reloc-batch1) is at "qualification" stage in the CRM.
Investigate Mina's Vectral Workload: The agent should search Slack using conversations_search_messages (search_query: "Mina Vectral" or "Vectral renegotiation" or similar) and CRM using crm_search_deals (dealname: "Vectral") to confirm Mina is stretched thin managing the Vectral Systems contract renegotiation alongside the new Terraform account assignment.

Also check whether volume pricing has been formalized (it hasn't—Alejandro modeled tiers but no formal agreement exists).
Discover David's Personal Email: The agent should search emails using search_emails (query: "David" or "out sick" or "OOO" or similar) to find David Chen's "Out Sick - April 26" email, which contains his personal email address david_rocks@yahoo.com. This is needed for CC'ing David on the apology email to Rachel, since he is out of office and not reachable at his work email.
Flag CRM Deal as At Risk: The agent must update the Terraform Digital deal stage to "at_risk" using crm_update_deal_stage (id: the discovered deal ID, dealstage: "at_risk"). Since crm_update_deal_stage only accepts id and dealstage, the agent should also log a detailed engagement note summarizing all open issues using crm_create_engagement (engagement_type: "NOTE", body: summary of open issues, company_ids: [Terraform company ID]).

📋 Rubrics
Rubric Results
✓ Pass ✗ Fail Click any row to expand justifications
# Criterion Run #1Run #2Run #3Run #4Run #5Run #6 Pass Rate
1 The model must use a CRM tool (e.g., crm_search_companies, crm_search_deals, or crm_get_company) to look up the Terraform Digital or Vantage Distributed account.
tool selection
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1The agent called crm_search_companies with 'Terraform', crm_search_deals with 'Terraform', and crm_get_company with 'company-terraform-digital'. Multiple CRM lookup tools were used to find the account.
✓Run #2The agent called crm_search_companies with 'Terraform', crm_search_contacts with 'Rachel Nguyen', crm_search_deals with 'Terraform', and crm_get_company with 'company-terraform-digital' — multiple CRM lookups for the account.
✓Run #3The agent called crm_search_companies with 'Terraform' and later crm_get_company with the company ID 'company-terraform-digital', successfully looking up the account.
✓Run #4The agent called crm_search_companies with 'Terraform', then crm_get_company with the discovered company ID, and crm_search_deals with 'Terraform', clearly searching the CRM for the account.
✓Run #5The agent called crm_search_companies with 'Terraform', then crm_search_contacts with 'Rachel Nguyen' which returned company-terraform-digital, and then crm_get_company with that ID, confirming the Vantage Distributed record. Also called crm_search_deals with 'Terraform'.
✓Run #6The agent called crm_search_companies with 'Terraform', crm_search_deals with 'Terraform', and crm_get_company with the discovered company ID 'company-terraform-digital'.
2 The model must use a Linear tool (e.g., linear_list_issues or linear_get_issue) to search for existing Terraform-related tickets.
tool selection
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1The agent called linear_list_issues multiple times, including with the query 'Terraform', 'invoice', 'pricing', 'AWS', and others to search for existing tickets related to the account.
✓Run #2The agent called linear_list_issues multiple times with queries including 'Terraform', 'AWS', 'onboarding', 'cost alert', 'infrastructure cost', 'pricing', and a broad limit:50 search. It discovered the existing ticket #187 through these searches.
✓Run #3The agent made multiple linear_list_issues calls with queries like 'invoice', 'email safety', 'Terraform', 'Vantage cost', etc., searching for existing tickets.
✓Run #4The agent called linear_list_issues multiple times with queries including 'Terraform', 'invoice attachment', 'pricing', 'invoice email template safety', and 'attachment mismatch', satisfying the criterion of searching Linear for existing tickets.
✓Run #5The agent called linear_list_issues with query 'Terraform' early in the trajectory, then also searched with 'invoice attachment mismatch', 'invoice email safety', and listed all issues without a query filter.
✓Run #6The agent made multiple linear_list_issues calls with queries like 'Terraform', 'invoice email attachment', 'invoice', 'pricing volume', 'onboarding coordinator', and 'Terraform coordinator'.
3 The model must use an Airtable tool (e.g., airtable_search_records or airtable_list_records) to check Terraform Digital relocation records or account status.
tool selection
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1The agent called airtable_list_bases, airtable_list_tables, and airtable_search_records with queries for 'Terraform', 'Terraform Digital', and employee names like 'Priya Dasgupta' to look up relocation records.
✓Run #2The agent called airtable_list_bases, airtable_list_tables, and airtable_search_records on both the Relocations table (searching 'Terraform' and 'Vantage') and the Client Accounts table to check for existing Terraform records.
✓Run #3The agent called airtable_list_bases, airtable_list_tables, and airtable_search_records (with 'Terraform' and 'Vantage' as values) to check relocation records.
✓Run #4The agent called airtable_list_bases, airtable_list_tables, airtable_list_records on the Relocations table, and airtable_search_records with both 'Terraform' and 'Vantage' as values, clearly checking Airtable for relocation records.
✓Run #5The agent called airtable_list_bases, airtable_list_tables, then airtable_search_records on 'Relocations' and 'Client Accounts' tables with both 'Terraform' and 'Vantage' as search values.
✓Run #6The agent called airtable_list_bases, airtable_list_tables, and airtable_search_records with both 'Terraform' and 'Vantage' as search values in the Relocations and Client Accounts tables.
4 The model must pass a query related to 'Terraform' or 'Vantage' or 'Rachel Nguyen' (or similar) when calling conversations_search_messages.
query construction
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1The first conversations_search_messages call used search_query: 'Terraform' with limit 50. Subsequent calls also used 'Terraform'-related queries.
✓Run #2The agent called conversations_search_messages with 'Terraform Digital' as the first Slack search query, and also searched 'volume pricing Terraform Rachel', 'Catalina reply all pricing leaked', and other Terraform-related queries.
✓Run #3The agent's first conversations_search_messages call used 'Terraform' as the query, and later calls used 'Vantage Distributed' variants — matching the required terms.
✓Run #4The agent called conversations_search_messages with search_query 'Terraform' as one of its first actions, and also with 'Vectral renegotiation Mina' and other related queries.
✓Run #5The agent called conversations_search_messages with search_query='Terraform' as one of its first parallel searches, which satisfies the criterion of passing a Terraform-related query.
✓Run #6The agent's first conversations_search_messages call used 'Terraform' as the search_query. Later calls also used 'Vantage' indirectly via CRM lookups and additional Slack searches.
5 The model must pass a query related to 'AWS' or 'cost spike' or 'infrastructure' (or similar) when searching for the AWS cost surge.
query construction
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1The agent called conversations_search_messages with 'AWS cost spike' and 'AWS cost Terraform onboarding', and search_emails with 'AWS cost' and 'root cause AWS Vantage' to find the cost spike details.
✓Run #2The agent called search_emails with 'AWS cost spike' and conversations_search_messages with 'AWS cost spike Terraform onboarding' — targeted queries for the infrastructure cost incident.
✓Run #3The agent called conversations_search_messages with 'AWS cost spike' and 'Vantage Distributed AWS cost increase', and search_emails with 'Vantage Distributed cost AWS', all targeting the AWS cost surge.
✓Run #4The agent called conversations_search_messages with 'AWS cost spike' and 'AWS cost', and also searched emails with 'Terraform', targeting the AWS cost spike incident.
✓Run #5The agent made multiple searches including conversations_search_messages with 'AWS cost spike', 'AWS cost Terraform onboarding', 'Samira AWS cost RDS Vantage onboarding', and search_emails with 'AWS cost', 'root cause Samira AWS cost', 'cost spike Vantage infrastructure'.
✓Run #6The agent made multiple targeted searches for AWS cost information: conversations_search_messages with 'AWS cost spike Terraform onboarding', 'AWS cost RDS CloudWatch', 'cost spike budget alert', and search_emails with 'AWS cost'.
6 The Terraform Digital deal stage was updated to 'at_risk' (or equivalent) using crm_update_deal_stage, and the tool returned a success response.
outcome
 ✗✗✗✗✗✗ 0%
✗Run #1The agent attempted crm_update_deal_stage with dealstage='at_risk' but received an error (invalid stage). It then updated to 'qualifiedtobuy' which is not equivalent to 'at_risk'. The criterion requires the deal to be flagged as 'at_risk' or equivalent with a success response, which was not achieved.
✗Run #2The agent attempted crm_update_deal_stage with dealstage 'at_risk' but received an error: 'Invalid deal stage: at_risk. Valid stages: [appointmentscheduled, qualifiedtobuy, presentationscheduled, ...]'. The agent then updated to 'presentationscheduled' instead. The at_risk stage was never successfully set.
✗Run #3The agent called crm_update_deal_stage with dealstage 'At Risk', but the tool returned an error: 'Invalid deal stage: At Risk. Valid stages: [...]'. The deal stage was never successfully updated to at_risk or equivalent.
✗Run #4The agent attempted crm_update_deal_stage with dealstage 'At Risk' but received an error: 'Invalid deal stage: At Risk. Valid stages: [appointmentscheduled, qualifiedtobuy, ...]'. The stage was never successfully updated to at_risk or equivalent.
✗Run #5The agent called crm_update_deal_stage with dealstage='at_risk', but the tool returned an error: 'Invalid deal stage: at_risk. Valid stages: [appointmentscheduled, qualifiedtobuy, ...]'. The tool did not return a success response.
✗Run #6The agent called crm_update_deal_stage with dealstage 'At Risk', but the tool returned an error: 'Invalid deal stage: At Risk. Valid stages: appointmentscheduled, qualifiedtobuy, ...' The update failed and the deal was not successfully updated to at_risk.
7 An email was sent (via send_email) with recipient [rachel.nguyen@terraformdigital.com](mailto:rachel.nguyen@terraformdigital.com), and the tool returned a success response.
